technologies.name: Java-Design-Patterns
technologies.description: A comprehensive collection of Gang of Four and other design patterns implemented in Java. Provides clear, production-ready code examples for developers learning or reference design patterns in their projects.

technologies.name: Puppeteer
technologies.description: Puppeteer is a Node.js library that provides a high-level API to control Chrome or Firefox headless browsers. It's widely used for web scraping, end-to-end testing, browser automation, and generating screenshots or PDFs of web pages.

technologies.name: Immich
technologies.description: A high-performance, self-hosted photo and video management solution that provides features similar to Google Photos but with full data ownership. Offers backup, organization, and sharing capabilities for personal media.

technologies.name: Tailwindcss
technologies.description: A utility-first CSS framework that enables rapid UI development through pre-built utility classes. It has become a standard choice for modern web development projects.

technologies.name: Nvm
technologies.description: Node Version Manager - A POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active Node.js versions. Essential tool for developers working with Node.js to switch between different versions easily.

technologies.name: Bitcoin
technologies.description: Bitcoin Core is the reference implementation of the Bitcoin cryptocurrency protocol. With 88k+ GitHub stars, it represents the most widely adopted decentralized digital currency, serving as the backbone of the cryptocurrency ecosystem used by millions globally.

technologies.name: Markitdown
technologies.description: Python library for converting various file formats (PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, images) and office documents to Markdown format. Provides simple API for document transformation workflows.

technologies.name: Python
technologies.description: All Algorithms implemented in Python

technologies.name: ollama
technologies.description: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

technologies.name: go
technologies.description: The Go programming language

technologies.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

technologies.name: storybook
technologies.description: Storybook is the industry standard workshop for building, documenting, and testing UI components in isolation

technologies.name: firecrawl
technologies.description: 🔥 The Web Data API for AI - Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data

technologies.name: gin
technologies.description: Gin is a high-performance HTTP web framework written in Go. It provides a Martini-like API but with significantly better performance—up to 40 times faster—thanks to httprouter. Gin is designed for building REST APIs, web applications, and microservices.

technologies.name: django
technologies.description: The Web framework for perfectionists with deadlines.

technologies.description: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step

technologies.name: bun
technologies.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

technologies.name: mermaid
technologies.description: Generation of diagrams like flowcharts or sequence diagrams from text in a similar manner as markdown

technologies.description: The most popular HTML, CSS, and JavaScript framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.

watchlist.name: ohmyzsh
watchlist.description: 🙃   A delightful community-driven (with 2,400+ contributors) framework for managing your zsh configuration. Includes 300+ optional plugins (rails, git, macOS, hub, docker, homebrew, node, php, python, etc), 140+ themes to spice up your morning, and an auto-update tool that makes it easy to keep up with the latest updates from the community.
